text_original: Motse said : In the beginning of human life, when there was yet no law and government, the custom was everybody according to his own idea ” Accordingly each man had his own idea, two men had two different ideas and ten men had ten different ideas— the more people the more different notions.
text_normalized: Motse said : In the beginning of human life, when there was yet no law and government, the custom was everybody according to his own idea ” Accordingly each man had his own idea, two men had two different ideas and ten men had ten different ideas— the more people the more different notions.

text_original: And everybody approved of his oto view and disapproved the views of others, and so arose mutual dis-approval among men.
text_normalized: And everybody approved of his oto view and disapproved the views of others, and so arose mutual dis-approval among men.

text_original: As a result, father and son and elder and younger brothers became enemies and were estranged from each other, since they were tmable to reach any agree-ment.
text_normalized: As a result, father and son and elder and younger brothers became enemies and were estranged from each other, since they were tmable to reach any agree-ment.

text_original: Everybody worked for the disadvantage of the others with water, fire, and poison.
text_normalized: Everybody worked for the disadvantage of the others with water, fire, and poison.

text_original: Surplus energy was not spent for mutual aid ; surplus goods were allowed to rot without sharing ; excellent teachings (Tao) were kept secret and not revealed.
text_normalized: Surplus energy was not spent for mutual aid ; surplus goods were allowed to rot without sharing ; excellent teachings (Tao) were kept secret and not revealed.

text_original: The disorder in the (human) world could be translation of it.
text_normalized: The disorder in the (human) world could be translation of it.

text_original: Finally the effort is given up, and it is rendered differently as notion “ idea ”, view purpose ”, and“ standard ”, in different connexions.
text_normalized: Finally the effort is given up, and it is rendered differently as notion “ idea ”, view purpose ”, and“ standard ”, in different connexions.

text_original: compared to that among birds and beasts.
text_normalized: compared to that among birds and beasts.

text_original: Yet all this dis-order was due to the want of a ruler.
text_normalized: Yet all this dis-order was due to the want of a ruler.

text_original: Therefore (Heaven) chose the virtuous in the world and crowned him emperor.
text_normalized: Therefore (Heaven) chose the virtuous in the world and crowned him emperor.

text_original: Feeling the insufficiency of his capacity, the emperor chose the virtuous in the world and installed them as the three ministers.
text_normalized: Feeling the insufficiency of his capacity, the emperor chose the virtuous in the world and installed them as the three ministers.

text_original: Seeing the vastness of the empire and the difficulty of attending to matters of right and mong and profit and harm among peoples of far countries, the three ministers divided the empire into feudal states and assigned them to feudal lords.
text_normalized: Seeing the vastness of the empire and the difficulty of attending to matters of right and mong and profit and harm among peoples of far countries, the three ministers divided the empire into feudal states and assigned them to feudal lords.

text_original: Feeling the insufficiency of their capacity, the feudal lords, in turn, chose the virtuous of their states and appointed them as their officials.
text_normalized: Feeling the insufficiency of their capacity, the feudal lords, in turn, chose the virtuous of their states and appointed them as their officials.

text_original: When the rulers were all installed, the emperor issued a mandate to all the people, saying : ‘MJpon hearing good or evil one shall report it to a superior.
text_normalized: When the rulers were all installed, the emperor issued a mandate to all the people, saying : ‘MJpon hearing good or evil one shall report it to a superior.

text_original: What the superior thinks to be right all shall think to be right ; what the superior thinks to be wrong all shall think to be wrong.
text_normalized: What the superior thinks to be right all shall think to be right ; what the superior thinks to be wrong all shall think to be wrong.

text_original: When the superior is at fault there shall be good counsel, when the subordinates show virtue there shall be popular recommendation.
text_normalized: When the superior is at fault there shall be good counsel, when the subordinates show virtue there shall be popular recommendation.

text_original: To identify one’s self with the superior and not to unite one’s self with the subordinates — this is what deserves encouragement from above and praise from below.
text_normalized: To identify one’s self with the superior and not to unite one’s self with the subordinates — this is what deserves encouragement from above and praise from below.

text_original: On the other hand, if upon hearing good or evil one should not report to a superior ; if what the superior thought to be right one should not think to be right ; if what the superior thought to be wrong one should not think to bo wrong ; if when the superior was at fault there should be no good counsel ; if when the subordinates showed virtue there should be no popular recommendation; if there should be common cause with subordinates and no identification with the superior— this is what deserves punish ment from above and condemnation from below/’ The superior made this the basis of reward and punishment.
text_normalized: On the other hand, if upon hearing good or evil one should not report to a superior ; if what the superior thought to be right one should not think to be right ; if what the superior thought to be wrong one should not think to bo wrong ; if when the superior was at fault there should be no good counsel ; if when the subordinates showed virtue there should be no popular recommendation; if there should be common cause with subordinates and no identification with the superior— this is what deserves punish ment from above and condemnation from below/’ The superior made this the basis of reward and punishment.

text_original: He was clear-sighted and won his people’s confidence.
text_normalized: He was clear-sighted and won his people’s confidence.

text_original: Now the head of the village was the most high-minded and tender-hearted man of the village.
text_normalized: Now the head of the village was the most high-minded and tender-hearted man of the village.

text_original: He notified the people of the village, saying : Upon hearing good or evil you shall report it to the head of the district.
text_normalized: He notified the people of the village, saying : Upon hearing good or evil you shall report it to the head of the district.

text_original: What the head of the district thinks to be right, all shall think to be right.
text_normalized: What the head of the district thinks to be right, all shall think to be right.

text_original: What he thinks to be wrong, all shall think to be wrong.
text_normalized: What he thinks to be wrong, all shall think to be wrong.

text_original: Put away from your speech that which is not good and learn his good speech.
text_normalized: Put away from your speech that which is not good and learn his good speech.

text_original: Remove from your conduct that which is not good and learn his good conduct.
text_normalized: Remove from your conduct that which is not good and learn his good conduct.

text_original: How then can there be disorder in the district Now, how was order brought about in the district ?
text_normalized: How then can there be disorder in the district Now, how was order brought about in the district ?

text_original: There was order in the district because the head could unify the standards of the district.

text_original: The head of the district was the most high-minded and tender-hearted man of the district.

text_original: Remove from your speech that which is not good and learn his good speech.
text_normalized: Remove from your speech that which is not good and learn his good speech.

text_original: Take away from your conduct that which is not good and learn his good conduct.
text_normalized: Take away from your conduct that which is not good and learn his good conduct.

text_original: How then can there be disorder in the state ?
text_normalized: How then can there be disorder in the state ?

text_original: How then can there be disorder in the empire ?
text_normalized: How then can there be disorder in the empire ?

text_normalized: ’’ Now, how is order brought about in the empire ?

text_original: There was order in the empire because the emperor could unify the standards in the empire.
text_normalized: There was order in the empire because the emperor could unify the standards in the empire.

text_original: If, however, the people all identify themselves with the Son of Heaven but not with Heaven itself, then the jungle  is still unremoved.
text_normalized: If, however, the people all identify themselves with the Son of Heaven but not with Heaven itself, then the jungle  is still unremoved.

text_original: Now, the frequent visitations of hurricanes and torrents are just the punish-ments from Heaven upon the people for their not identifying their standards with the Will of Heaven.
text_normalized: Now, the frequent visitations of hurricanes and torrents are just the punish-ments from Heaven upon the people for their not identifying their standards with the Will of Heaven.

text_original: Therefore, Motse said : The sage-kings of old devised the five punishments  to rule the people in order to be able to lay hands on those who did not identify themselves with their superiors — a device of the same nature as threads are tied into skeins and a net is controlled by a main rope.
text_normalized: Therefore, Motse said : The sage-kings of old devised the five punishments  to rule the people in order to be able to lay hands on those who did not identify themselves with their superiors — a device of the same nature as threads are tied into skeins and a net is controlled by a main rope.
